texto: I didn't go to university, and so, every time that I work, I'm looking for a teacher in a way. I'm looking for people that I can learn from and to have the chance to work with people that I admire.
explicacao: Citação de Diego Luna sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I didn't go to university, and so, every time that I work, I'm looking for a teacher in a way. I'…” articula educacao, work, time em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e time.

texto: Many times when you're a tourist you can just stay on the surface and not really experience the place you're visiting, which will probably leave you disappointed. Everywhere has something interesting; it's just about being curious enough to find it and scratch where you have to scratch and stay longer and walk further.
